case.title: SIEBEL v. DEPARTMENT OF WELFARE OF THE CITY OF NEW YORK

opinion.h: SIEBEL v. DEPARTMENT OF WELFARE OF THE CITY OF NEW YORK, 361 U.S. 535 (1960)
SIEBEL v. DEPARTMENT OF WELFARE OF THE CITY OF NEW YORK. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK. No. 568. Decided February 23, 1960.
opinion.p: Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
opinion.h: BD., EDUCATION, UNION FREE SCHOOL DIST. NO. 3 v. ALLEN, 361 U.S. 535 (1960)
opinion.p: 361 U.S. 535 BOARD OF EDUCATION OF UNION FREE SCHOOL DIST. NO. 3 ET AL. v. ALLEN, COMMISSIONER OF EDUCATION. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK. No. 571. Decided February 23, 1960.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
Reported below: 6 N.Y.2d 871, 983; 160 N.E.2d 119, 161 N. E. 2d 738.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
